explanation: This task_id was the prompt for the previous tick's VALIDATE phase delivered to flywheel:p1 orchestrator. The orchestrator session is continuous across ticks (Claude Code conversation), so there is no separate worker process to emit a callback packet. The orchestrator processes tick prompts inline and emits the next tick's outputs (dispatches, bead closures, xpane packets) as direct conversation effects — not as DONE callbacks. This is structurally different from worker callbacks. Treating it as no-bead-receipt is correct: nothing to validate, nothing failed, nothing to fix.
